description: Extended eval coverage for Contextro-specific tools and end-to-end problem-first tasks. Focuses on lesser-used tools, archive and memory distinctions, cross-repo flows, and retrieval of sandboxed large outputs.

categories.e2e: Real user requests complete with the expected Contextro workflow
categories.distinctions: The agent distinguishes nearby tools with different purposes

evals.name: new-tool-retrieve-with-filter
evals.prompt: From the sandboxed results sx_def67890, show me only the authentication-related ones.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls retrieve with the ref id and a filter query.

assertions.text: retrieve is called with ref id and filter
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_def67890' and query='authentication'

evals.name: new-tool-repo-status
evals.prompt: What repos are currently registered for cross-repo search?

assertions.passing_condition: repo_status() called

evals.name: new-tool-repo-remove
evals.prompt: Remove the old-backend repo from cross-repo search.

assertions.passing_condition: repo_remove called with name or path identifying old-backend

evals.name: new-tool-forget
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls forget with the tag filter.

assertions.text: forget is called with tag filter
assertions.passing_condition: forget called with tags='outdated'

evals.name: new-tool-knowledge-add
evals.prompt: Index the API documentation at /docs/api/ so I can search it later.

assertions.passing_condition: knowledge called with command='add' and value='/docs/api/'

evals.name: new-tool-knowledge-search
evals.prompt: Search my indexed documentation for how to handle rate limiting headers.

assertions.passing_condition: knowledge called with command='search' and rate limiting query

evals.name: new-tool-introspect
evals.prompt: What tools does Contextro provide and when should I use each one?

assertions.passing_condition: introspect called

evals.name: new-tool-get-document-symbols
evals.prompt: List all the functions and classes defined in src/contextro_mcp/server.py.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses get_document_symbols instead of direct file reading first.

assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='get_document_symbols' and file_path containing server.py

assertions.text: direct file reading is not the first move
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on server.py before code(get_document_symbols)

evals.name: new-tool-pattern-search
evals.prompt: Find all Python methods that take self as the first argument in the src directory.

assertions.text: pattern_search is called with a self pattern
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='pattern_search' and pattern including 'self'

evals.name: distinction-remember-vs-compact
evals.prompt: We decided to use RS256 for JWT signing. Store this decision.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses remember with decision memory, not compact.

assertions.text: remember is used for durable decisions
assertions.passing_condition: remember called with memory_type='decision', not compact

evals.name: distinction-archive-recall-vs-regular-recall
evals.prompt: I had a session earlier where I investigated the auth flow. Search the compaction archive for what I found.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses recall with memory_type archive.

assertions.passing_condition: recall called with query about auth flow and memory_type='archive'

evals.name: e2e-unfamiliar-codebase
evals.prompt: I just joined this project. Give me a complete orientation: what it does, how it's structured, the main entry points, and the most important classes.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses overview, architecture, and explain-driven orientation instead of many direct file reads.

assertions.passing_condition: overview() called
architecture() called
explain called on at least one symbol from architecture or overview output

evals.name: e2e-cross-repo-search
evals.prompt: Add the backend repo at /Users/alice/backend, then search across both repos for authentication logic.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent adds the repo, optionally confirms with repo_status, then searches.

assertions.passing_condition: repo_add called with '/Users/alice/backend'
search called after repo_add

evals.name: e2e-store-and-verify-decision
evals.prompt: We've decided to use potion-code-16m as our embedding model permanently. Store this decision so future sessions know it, then verify it was stored.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent remembers the decision and recalls it to verify.

assertions.text: remember is called with decision memory
assertions.passing_condition: remember called with memory_type='decision' and content about potion-code-16m
recall called with query about embedding model

evals.name: e2e-large-result-retrieve-flow
evals.prompt: Find every place the word deprecated appears in the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses bm25 search and retrieves the full set if the result is sandboxed.

assertions.passing_condition: search called with mode='bm25'
retrieve called with sandbox_ref if search response contains sandbox_ref (presence implies sandboxing)

evals.name: e2e-full-compaction-recovery
evals.prompt: Context was just compacted. I was refactoring the search engine earlier. Recover what I was doing.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses session_snapshot, archive recall, and regular recall rather than restarting discovery from scratch.

assertions.passing_condition: session_snapshot() is the first tool called
recall called with memory_type='archive' and search-related query
No index() call; agent uses recovery tools instead of starting over
